market_context.note: Volatile session - partial rebound from 14:35 lows but IWM approaching stop-loss again

decision.reasoning: IWM at -4.95% (0.05% from stop-loss). FEZ at -4.43% (0.57% from stop-loss). High volatility environment with ~4 hours to US close. Discipline remains: no intraday exits. If IWM closes below -5%, stop-loss executes at 21:30 UTC. Current price action suggests choppy session with no clear direction. Cash buffer at 40.5% provides protection. Holding all positions until close.
decision.risk_assessment: Elevated - IWM extremely close to stop-loss threshold

scenarios.bullish: Market rebounds in final 4h, IWM closes above -5%, no action needed
scenarios.bearish: IWM closes below -5%, stop-loss triggers, position sold
